name: Vive Capital
notes: VIVE Venture Capital; formerly addressed in San Bruno CA, current filing shows Palo Alto CA. Website is vivevc.com. Late-stage/M&A-focused VC.

name: Wicklow Capital
notes: Wicklow Capital Inc — Dan Tierney family office based in Chicago, IL. Multiple sources confirm Chicago headquarters.

name: XCap
notes: XCap is the trading name for Expanding Capital, a VC firm at 1204 Burlingame Ave, Burlingame CA. Domain is xcap.vc.

name: XN Ventures
notes: XN LP / XN Ventures, founded 2018 by Gaurav Kapadia. HQ at 412 West 15th Street, New York NY 10011. Invests in public and private companies.

name: Yard Ventures
notes: Yard Ventures is an Alumni Ventures fund focused on Harvard alumni. HQ: 7 Post Office Square, 6th Floor, Boston MA 02110. Part of Alumni Ventures (av.vc).

name: Menlo VC
notes: Menlo Ventures, founded 1976, headquartered in Menlo Park CA. Also has a San Francisco office. One of Silicon Valley's oldest active VC firms.

name: lightbank
notes: Chicago-based VC firm founded in 2010 by Eric Lefkofsky and Brad Keywell. HQ: 600 W Chicago Ave, Suite 700, Chicago IL 60654.

name: AngelList
notes: AngelList is headquartered in San Francisco, CA. Platform for startups, angel investors, and venture capital.

name: Deterrence
notes: Deterrence Defense Inc — autonomous manufacturing/defense tech startup. HQ: 205 Detroit Street, Denver CO. Founded 2023. Raised $10.1M seed.

name: Swish Robotics
notes: Swish Robotics — consumer robotics startup founded 2022. AI-powered countertop cooking robot (Bento). Raised $2.5M pre-seed led by Accel. HQ San Francisco, CA.

name: CivicIQ
notes: Matched to Civic IQ (civiciq.com) — public sector sales intelligence platform, HQ Hoboken NJ, founded 2024. Note: a separate entity civiciq.io (community insights) also exists; chosen civiciq.com as more prominent/funded match.

name: Domos
notes: Domos — AI PropTech startup for residential property management (condo/co-op boards). Founded 2022, NYC. Raised $3.3M seed (TenOneTen Ventures). Domain: joindomos.com.
